commit_message:
Fix: provisional fix by disable warnings & correctly use `var` Fix: provisional fix by disable warnings & correctly use `var` + There is a minor error by taking out bit at position `[0]` from a bit (not a bit array)
  + Fix: just remove the `[0]`
+ In current implementation, `wire` is passed to dpi functions within procedural context
  + Fix: change them to `var`
+ Several warnings are raised from `hw/rtl` entry, preventing verilator from compiling
  + Fix: disable some warnings in `rtlsim`
